# zioshade status

Reconciled: `2026-07-08` from `zig build strict-gate` (spirv-val unavailable on the reconcile host).

## Conformance (`zig build conformance`, every fixture's SPIR-V validated with spirv-val)

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| PASS (compiled clean, fail-loud API) | 2104 |
| FAIL (compile) | 0 |
| FAIL (FP-regression) | 0 |
| XFAIL (known-unsupported, documented) | 11 |
| SKIP | regenerate via `just status` |
| FAIL (spirv-val) | regenerate via `just status` |

The suite exits 0 when `FAIL (spirv-val) == 0` and `FAIL (compile) == 0`
(PASS + XFAIL + SKIP == TOTAL). XFAIL entries are the curated, documented
known-unsupported fixtures (`KNOWN_UNSUPPORTED` in `tests/runner.zig`), not
silent failures; zioshade honest-errors on them.

`zig build strict-gate` reports `PASS: 2104 · XFAIL: 11 · FAIL (FP-regression): 0`.

These numbers are authoritative; any conformance count quoted elsewhere in the
docs should point here rather than hardcode a value (regenerate with
`just status` on a machine with spirv-val).
